rulings.Case Title: NIKKI MARKMAN VS. YUN ZHEN WANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Reopen Discovery And Extend The Deadline For The Court To Hear A Discovery Motion And To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Yue Zhen Wang; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Yue Zhen Want And Her Counsel, Jimmie Williams, In The Amount Of $1,735
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF NIKKI MARKMAN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Reopen Discovery And Extend The Deadline For The Court To Hear A Discovery Motion And To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Yue Zhen Wang; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Yue Zhen Want And Her Counsel, Jimmie Williams, In The Amount Of $1,735 Hearing required. Parties to meet and confer in good faith before the hearing. Parties to report their progress at 9:30 a.m. The Court is inclined to grant Plaintiff's request for sanctions. Defendant's declaration is devoid of any explanation for failure to engage in meet and confer initiated by Plaintiff. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNA L. PFEISTER VS. GRAMERCY TOWERS CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Gramercy Towers Condominium Association'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2020 line 8. DEFENDANT GRAMERCY TOWERS CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION Gramercy Towers Condominium Association'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof is DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the entire complaint should be stricken under CC 5950. Furthermore, late-filed CC 5950 Certification is now on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: G & G PARTNERS, L.P., VS. AMERICAN CONSERVATORY THEATER, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance For Write Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2020 line 9. PLAINTIFF G & G PARTNERS, L.P., Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance For Write Of Attachment is GRANTED in part, Hearing Required in part. Motion is granted as to June 1, 2020- August 31, 2020 rent, additional rent and late charges; and attorney's fees and costs. Hearing Required to address any authority for attachment of rent amounts after possession has been surrendered and mitigation of damages. Plaintiff may file supplemental brief/declaration no later than January 19, 2021 by 8:30 a.m. Brief shall be limited to citation to authorities, no argument. Declaration, if any, shall be limited to facts re: mitigation. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JKRISTALINVESTMENTS LLC VS. MAURICIO SANCHEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2020 line 10. DEFENDANT MAURICIO SANCHEZ DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer based on uncertainty is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clarify allegations in paragraph 8 of the form complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that CCP 1166 is applicable to the Notice. Further, even assuming that argument based on King v. Connolly (1872) 44 Cal. 236 is applicable to this notice to pay rent or quit, it raises factual disputes not appropriate for determination at this stage of the litigation. =(501/CFH)
